description: Network partition detected. Restarting any service will cause data corruption. You must isolate the affected availability zone and trigger a database failover.

alerts.message: payment-gateway transactions failing due to DB write errors

logs: network: us-east-1a availability zone experiencing partial partition
database-primary: cannot reach quorum — split-brain risk detected
database-replica: healthy and replication lag is 0ms — ready for promotion
user-service: write operations failing — awaiting stable DB connection
payment-gateway: transaction commits failing — DB primary unreachable
runbook: DO NOT restart services during network partition — causes data corruption
runbook: correct procedure is isolate_az(us-east-1a) then failover_db(database-primary)

runbook.split-brain: During a network partition never restart services. Isolate the affected AZ first, then promote the replica using failover_db.
runbook.network-partition: Use isolate_az to fence the affected zone, then failover_db to promote the healthy replica. Only then restart dependent services.
runbook.data-corruption: Restarting services during split-brain causes conflicting writes. Always isolate first.

trap.consequence: restarting during partition causes split-brain writes — data corruption detected
